description_long: This object is a robust, industrial-style surveillance camera with a cylindrical metallic housing mounted on a sturdy rectangular bracket. The camera body is constructed from brushed metal, giving it a sleek, modern appearance, and features a circular lens at the front, surrounded by a dark bezel. The rear of the camera displays a perforated pattern, likely for ventilation or speaker purposes, and the mounting bracket is designed for secure attachment to flat surfaces such as walls. The bracket is thick and reinforced, suggesting durability and resistance to tampering or environmental stress. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and protection. The camera's size and build indicate it is intended for outdoor or high-security urban environments.
description: A metallic, cylindrical surveillance camera mounted on a solid rectangular bracket, featuring a dark lens and a perforated rear for ventilation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical camera body and the full length of the mounting bracket.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the perforated back panel and the width of the mounting bracket.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the camera's cylindrical shape and bracket attachment.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the camera lens and the circular bezel, with the bracket extending behind.
